title: Immersive Chests
description: Fixes Minecraft’s static GUI opening with immersive in-world camera positioning.
body:
# Immersive Chests

Immersive Chests is a client-side Minecraft mod that dynamically repositions the camera when interacting with containers and workstations, creating a more grounded and immersive gameplay experience.

Instead of opening GUIs from a static viewpoint, the camera moves relative to the block you are interacting with — supporting directional views, contextual positioning, and immersive workstation interaction.

---

## Features

- Immersive camera positioning for containers and workstations
- Context-aware orientation and camera alignment
- Support for top-down, side-facing, and directional views
- Stable orientation-relative offset system
- Configurable camera distance, height, tilt, and behaviour
- Support for many vanilla and modded container blocks
- Client-side only

---

## Supported Blocks

- Chests (single and double)
- Barrels
- Ender Chests
- Shulker Boxes
- Furnaces, Smokers, Blast Furnaces
- Crafting Tables
- Hoppers & Hopper Minecarts
- Dispensers & Droppers
- Brewing Stands
- Lecterns
- Enchanting Tables
- Beacons
- Smithing Tables
- Stonecutters
- Looms
- Cartography Tables
- Anvils

Additional modded container blocks may also work automatically through generic container detection.

---

## Demonstration Video

Gameplay showcase and mod overview:

https://youtu.be/VU7Ad_PWuhA

---

## Configuration

Immersive Chests is fully configurable in-game.

For the best configuration experience, install Mod Menu:

https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu

For a guide on the functionality of the configuration see the wiki:
https://github.com/zacriah18/ImmersiveChests/wiki/Mod-Menu-Configuration

---

## Multiplayer Compatibility

- Client-side only
- Does not modify gameplay logic
- Does not alter inventories or interaction mechanics
- Intended to be safe for use on most servers

---

## Links

### GitHub Repository

https://github.com/zacriah18/ImmersiveChests

### Mod Menu

https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu

### Demonstration Video

https://youtu.be/VU7Ad_PWuhA

---

## Future Plans

Planned improvements may include:

- Additional camera modes
- Expanded modded block compatibility



## VERSION NOTICE

Please raise an issue on the gitHub page to request a version of the game you play a lot if it is not supported. Anything recent or a specific snapshot I'm happy to work on. I can only support versions that use cloth + fabric loader, sorry guys no alpha releases. I will continue with current releases and any version already out I will continue to support with any updates I make to this mod.
